No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops professional knowledge and practical skills for legal professionals (Target 4.4) through critical thinking.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly addresses ethical principles, professional responsibility, integrity, and accountability, which are fundamental to the rule of law, access to justice, and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.5, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes guest lectures from senior legal practitioners (judiciary, prosecution, defense), representing a minor multi-stakeholder partnership for education (Target 17.17).
